abbf38d7-ca71-4a00-8903-04d57a43ea5a.name: The Shrine
abbf38d7-ca71-4a00-8903-04d57a43ea5a.description: A  wide, dusty hall honors the fallen knight Agellar, its monument standing vigil as a faint breeze drifts toward the ever-open entrance.

features.name: Monument of Agellar
features.description: A stone statue depicting a rearing horse and richly clad rider with an imperial inscription at its base

features.name: Water Troughs
features.description: Long stone channels of gently cycling spring water line both sides of the hall

features.name: Dusty Floor
features.description: A thick layer of dust constantly disturbed by a faint current of air

features.name: Pile of torches
features.description: A divinely-provisioned pile of illumination devices, complete with one tinderbox

exits.label: Exterior Door
exits.description: The tomb’s heavy stone entrance stands open to the plains outside

exits.label: Caretaker’s Door
exits.description: A small wooden door set into the right-hand wall

exits.label: Secret Passage
exits.description: A concealed opening revealed by twisting the horse’s head

31866692-d43c-48ac-99d6-da3facd08fec.name: The Caretaker’s Office
31866692-d43c-48ac-99d6-da3facd08fec.description: A cramped, dust-choked chamber filled with rotting furnishings, long abandoned by the living.

features.name: Rotted Furnishings
features.description: Decaying desks, chairs, and shelves once used by the tomb’s caretakers

features.name: Empty Storage
features.description: Cabinets and containers stripped of anything valuable long ago

features.name: Dust-Laden Air
features.description: Heavy layers of undisturbed dust coating nearly every surface

features.name: Doorway View
features.description: The office doorway offers a clear line of sight back into the shrine and the plains outside

exits.label: Door to Shrine
exits.description: The small wooden door leading back to the main hall

98f73871-d9f1-4315-81ed-772ff185a4ba.name: The Hall of Death
98f73871-d9f1-4315-81ed-772ff185a4ba.description: A narrow stair descends into darkness, ending at a narrow corridor and a rune-carved iron door heavy with menace.

features.name: Corridor
features.description: A corridor branching off to the left and right at the foot of the stairs

features.name: Lever Mechanism
features.description: A sturdy lever at the far right end of the corridor

exits.label: Stair to Shrine
exits.description: The narrow staircase ascending to the hidden passage above

exits.label: Iron Door
exits.description: A rune-carved barrier at the left end of the corridor

b7974704-2915-4643-b955-618f5476b387.name: Burial Chamber
b7974704-2915-4643-b955-618f5476b387.description: A treasure-strewn vault dominated by an immense sarcophagus, where the truth of Agellar’s legend awaits.

features.name: Central Sarcophagus
features.description: An enormous stone coffin resting at the chamber’s heart

features.name: Funerary Treasure
features.description: Scattered coins, jewels, and jewelry offerings left to honor the fallen

exits.label: Iron Doorway
exits.description: The heavy iron entrance back to the trapped hall
